programmes.show_description: A young mother addicted to crack cocaine takes her daughter on a risky drug smuggling job in Venezuela, but her world collapses when the two are torn apart.
All hell breaks loose for Turbo, Christian racks up massive mileage with a huge load, and the Wise couple feel the pressure of a fuel-draining headwind.
Reality series. In a quiet rural village in Leicestershire, a utility truck has got stuck in the mud in a local resident's garden. Adam and his team have to get it out.
Near the junction to East Midlands airport, a trailer sheds its load and causes rush hour chaos. Adam dispatches a crack team of his finest recovery ops.

With the last mill shutting down, Craig shifts into overdrive; the late season push hits hard on the crew and the equipment; as breakdowns add up, driver Taylor hits his breaking point.
The Traffic Cops come up against some of the most dangerous and vicious criminals operating on their North Yorkshire patch.

A Dog Unit double-feature kicks off this action-packed episode. First off, Jen and Quantum supply canine support to a major drug bust at a disused pub.
...Britain's Speeders. PCs hunt a possible cloned vehicle. After tasers are drawn, the driver gives up - but what has he got to hide? In Humberside, a man has three cars stolen.
On an epic manhunt, a police dog becomes star of the show after tracking suspects a mile away. And when interceptors wake a suspected burglar, he sinks his teeth into an officer's leg.
The night shift police of the Gloucestershire Constabulary deal with multiple car thefts, drunken misbehaviour in Cheltenham town centre, and a boy who has run off into the night...
Top scientists at an aeronautics research lab die under mysterious circumstances, with a mentally handicapped janitor the only other person around.
A troubled young father learns a hard lesson chasing a gangster lifestyle when he is set up as a decoy on a smuggling trip from Peru.
Mark feels the pressure of a job worth $2 million dollars, while Belinda is up to her neck in mess with a herd of cattle.
A 20-tonne digger has been written off after it fell into the Thames. Rory is dispatched to rescue a Sprinter which is blocking a bus lane.
A seven car motorway pile-up leaves a local council's waste truck in trouble. Fluff does his best to shift one of the heaviest loads his vehicle can lift.

Documentary series. A violent new crime wave known as County Lines is taking hold in Britain. Across the country, urban drug gangs are expanding their empires into small towns.
This all-action episode begins with reports of suspected lorry looters at a service station in Trowell, and firearms cops Jim and Lewis race to intercept.
In this high-octane episode, several units get on the tail of a white van that's been gunning it around town at four times the speed limit.
Cops pull over the driver of a suspected cloned car, who claims he's just swapped the regs between his two cars because one doesn't have insurance!
In the North East, Alpha's team rigs three wreckers to pull a 44-tonne truck from a ditch. Steve Kelly leads a team to clear a burning car transporter and there's a chemical spill on the M25.
Steve confronts pandemic checkpoints. Sludge encounters a ghost town in Western Australia, and car salvage truckers, Michael and Bozza, race to find outback treasures.
Working on a tip-off from Deep Throat, Mulder and Scully discover a strange case involving the cloning of extra-terrestrial viruses.
